Phantasmancy.name: Fog of Dreams
Phantasmancy.effect: The target can't be selected by anything outside of 12" as its target.

Phantasmancy.name: Mirror of Minds
Phantasmancy.effect: Both the Psyker and the target roll a D6 and add their respective Leadership values. If the target’s total is greater than the Psyker’s total, nothing happens. If the Psyker’s total is greater than or equal to the target’s total, the target model suffers one Mortal Wound. Continue this roll off until the target is dead or beats the Psyker's roll.

Phantasmancy.name: Misdirection
Phantasmancy.effect: The target can not be selected for a Charge command.

Phantasmancy.name: Twilight Pathways
Phantasmancy.effect: The target may immediately move up to its Movement value.

Phantasmancy.name: Veil of Tears
Phantasmancy.effect: The target can't selected any units outside of 18" as its target.

Phantasmancy.name: Shards of Light
Phantasmancy.effect: The target suffers six automatic hits with Strength: 5 AP: -1 D: 1; Seeking. Additionally, it gains one Battleshock token.
